reopen_history.reason: Step 1 (revert PR #1185) merged; this lane continues as step 2 (re-land the same relocation via a fresh branch/PR) under the same issue.

notes: Docs-only-fast-path was attempted first for step 1 (per dispatch.md) but CI's file-scope-lock-check.yml and tier-label-check.yml both hard-require a lane manifest to exist regardless of the fast-path exemption, so a manifest was added after the fact -- same pattern as the UTV2-1512/1513 backfill precedent. This is itself a gap in the T3 fast-path implementation (CI enforcement not matching dispatch.md's documented behavior) worth a follow-up issue, out of scope for this correction. Step 2 (this PR) reuses the manifest directly rather than re-running preflight/lane-start, since PL5 would correctly refuse a second lane-start while this issue's lane is still active.
